title: Potts Point shooting: man shot dead by NSW police in Sydney after allegedly assaulting two women
summary_full: New South Wales police allege man entered inner Sydney apartment complex on Tuesday morningFollow our Australia news live blog for latest updatesGet our breaking news email, free app or daily news podcastA man has been shot dead by police in Sydney’s Potts Point after allegedly entering an apartment complex and assaulting two women.New South Wales police said officers from Kings Cross command were called to a unit block on St Neot Avenue in Potts Point at about 10.50am on Tuesday, after reports an armed man had allegedly entered the complex and assaulted two women.
